title: Blue Spot Tools 29191 12 Piece Precision Hobby Knife Blades
features: The blades are manufactured from SK5 steel which is a mid-range carbon steel, this is great for durability and workability
The blades are ideal for intricate cutting and trimming.
The blades come in a storage box for easy storage and accessibility
Suitable for use with the Blue Spot Soft Grip Precision Knife (29612)
description: Product Description The Blue Spot Tools 12 PCE Precision Hobby Knife Blades are manufactured from SK5 steel. SK5 steel is a high carbon steel, its used in a wide range of tools like razor blades, utility knives, scalpel blades, long edge tools, cutting tools and much more due to its workability and hardenability. Ideal for intricate cutting and trimming. Includes 12 SK5 blades with a handy storage box. Suitable for use with the Blue Spot Soft Grip Precision Knife (29612). WARNING: Blades are extremely sharp. Please handle with care and dispose of safely. Keep away from children AGE RESTRICTIONS: Please note that under the Offensive Weapons Act 1996 this product cannot be sold to anyone under the age of 18 Safety Warning WARNING: Blades are extremely sharp.
